name: trade-x-indian-market-intelligence
description: Trade X: provider-agnostic Indian stock market analysis and trading intelligence app with verified delayed equity snapshots and demo options/backtest modules.

scripts.build: echo "Using prebuilt Trade X static site"
scripts.check: find src server scripts \( -name "*.js" -o -name "*.mjs" \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.live:test: node -e "import('./server/live-data-service.mjs').then(async m=>{const s=await m.getMarketSnapshot({force:true}); console.log(s.status, s.validation);})"
scripts.vercel-build: echo "Using prebuilt Trade X static site"
